footer_controls: WASD/Arrows: move  |  Left/Right: change  |  Q/E or Tab: category  |  R: default  |  Enter: confirm  |  Esc/F8: close  |  Shift/Ctrl: faster steps
experimental_note: Uses heuristics or is reserved for future hooks. Safe to save, but results may vary by enemy, boss, or scene.
desc_damage: Sets Hornet's base attack damage. Normal upgrades still add their usual bonus on top.
desc_health: Sets Hornet's base maximum health. Permanent health upgrades remain preserved on top of this base.
desc_drop: Global multiplier for currency and stackable item drops.
desc_damage_taken: Global fallback multiplier for incoming damage.
desc_healing_multiplier: Multiplies how much health each heal restores.
desc_healing_cost_multiplier: Multiplies the silk cost used for healing.
desc_invincibility_time_multiplier: Scales post-hit invulnerability frames and recovery safety window.
desc_skill_damage_multiplier: Multiplies damage from non-basic skill attacks detected through current combat hooks.
desc_silk_spear_damage_multiplier: Separate multiplier for silk spear style attacks detected by weapon/tool heuristics.
desc_boss_damage_multiplier: Multiplies Hornet's damage dealt to boss targets.
desc_common_enemy_damage_multiplier: Multiplies Hornet's damage dealt to non-boss enemies.
desc_critical_chance: Chance for outgoing damage to become a critical hit.
desc_critical_damage_multiplier: Damage multiplier applied when a critical hit happens.
desc_environmental_damage_multiplier: Scales spikes, acid, traps, and similar hazard damage when detected safely.
desc_boss_damage_taken_multiplier: Extra multiplier for damage received from boss sources.
desc_common_enemy_damage_taken_multiplie: Extra multiplier for damage received from common enemies.
desc_enemy_health_multiplier: Simulates enemy health scaling by adjusting how much damage common enemies effectively take.
desc_enemy_damage_multiplier: Extra multiplier applied to damage from common enemies.
desc_enemy_speed_multiplier: Reserved. Stored safely for future enemy movement hooks; no direct speed hook is active in this version.
desc_enemy_attack_cooldown_multiplier: Reserved. Stored safely for future enemy attack timing hooks.
desc_enemy_aggression_multiplier: Reserved. Stored safely for future AI aggression and detection range hooks.
desc_boss_health_multiplier: Simulates boss health scaling by adjusting how much damage boss targets effectively take.
desc_boss_damage_taken_multiplier: Extra multiplier for damage Hornet receives from bosses.
desc_boss_speed_multiplier: Reserved. Stored safely for future boss speed hooks.
desc_boss_attack_cooldown_multiplier: Reserved. Stored safely for future boss attack timing hooks.
desc_boss_brutal_mode: Enables an extra boss challenge layer with harsher healing and damage rules.
desc_disable_healing_during_boss: When enabled, healing returns zero health during boss fights.
desc_healing_during_boss_multiplier: Additional heal multiplier applied only while fighting bosses.
desc_currency_drop_multiplier: Extra multiplier for currency drops after the global drop rate is applied.
desc_item_drop_multiplier: Extra multiplier for stackable item drops after the global drop rate is applied.
desc_shop_price_multiplier: Experimental. Scales detected shop prices through safe cost getters; some special shops may not be covered.
desc_boss_reward_multiplier: Experimental. Scales currency gained while a boss scene is detected; unusual rewards may vary by scene.
desc_death_currency_loss_multiplier: Reserved. Stored safely, but no death-loss hook is active because generic currency hooks can affect shops and quests.
desc_player_speed_multiplier: Scales Hornet's run and walk speed at runtime.
desc_jump_height_multiplier: Scales jump force and minimum jump speed at runtime.
desc_dash_cooldown_multiplier: Scales dash cooldown timing, including harpoon dash recovery.
desc_ability_cost_multiplier: Multiplies general ability costs used by current silk skill hooks.
desc_one_hit_mode: Any incoming hit is scaled to remove all remaining health.
desc_menu_language: Changes only this mod menu language. Non-Brazilian Portuguese options are marked as AI-made and may fall back to English where no dedicated file exists yet.
desc_apply: Saves the current draft and applies it immediately.
desc_reset: Restores every setting to default values and applies them immediately.
desc_discard: Throws away the current draft and reloads the last applied values.
desc_back: Closes the menu. Unsaved draft changes are discarded.
desc_preset_easy: A lighter preset with more health, more damage, better healing, and better drops.
desc_preset_hard: A tougher preset with less health, stronger enemies, stronger bosses, and reduced drops.
desc_preset_nightmare: A punishing preset with reduced healing, high incoming damage, and expensive economy.
desc_preset_one_hit: A one-hit challenge preset with minimal health and no real healing safety net.
desc_preset_farm: A farming preset focused on safety, mobility, and extra rewards.
desc_preset_custom: Keeps whatever values you tune manually.
footer_controls_21: WASD/Arrows: move  |  Left/Right: change  |  Q/E or Tab: category  |  F: favorite  |  /: search  |  R: default  |  Enter: confirm  |  Esc/F8: close
reserved_note: Reserved: saved safely in config and presets, but no active gameplay hook is used in this version.
danger_warning: Warning: this option touches sensitive game behavior. It can cause odd animation, irregular AI, softlocks, extreme balance, or inconsistent results. Use carefully.
favorite_hint_on: Favorite enabled. Press F to remove it from Favorites.
favorite_hint_off: Press F to add this option to Favorites.
desc_summary_rating: Estimated difficulty based on your current draft. It updates as you change values.
desc_summary_score: Approximate score. Higher means harder; lower means easier.
desc_summary_profile: Quick label for the current build style.
desc_summary_mutator_count: How many special mutators are enabled.
desc_mutator_no_healing: Supported. Normal healing returns zero while enabled.
desc_mutator_low_gravity: Experimental. Uses the existing jump hook to create a lighter jump feel without changing global physics.
desc_mutator_double_damage: Supported. Multiplies Hornet's outgoing damage by 2.
desc_mutator_glass_cannon: Supported. Hornet deals much more damage, but incoming damage is also higher.
desc_mutator_fast_enemies: Reserved. Stored now for future enemy movement hooks.
desc_mutator_tank_enemies: Supported through damage scaling. Common enemies effectively take less damage.
desc_mutator_aggressive_enemies: Experimental. Adds a small safe pressure multiplier; deeper AI hooks are reserved.
desc_mutator_randomized_enemy_health: Experimental. Randomizes effective common enemy health per target and caches the result so it does not change on every hit.
desc_mutator_rich_world: Supported. Currency and item drops are increased.
desc_mutator_poor_world: Supported. Currency and item drops are reduced.
desc_mutator_expensive_shops: Experimental. Uses the same shop price hook as the shop price multiplier.
desc_mutator_no_death_loss: Reserved. Stored for future death currency hooks.
desc_mutator_boss_frenzy: Experimental. Uses current boss scene heuristics to increase boss pressure.
desc_mutator_no_mercy: Supported. Healing is blocked during boss fights.
desc_mutator_extended_fights: Supported through damage scaling. Bosses effectively take less damage.
desc_saved_preset_selector: Cycles through saved JSON presets in the presets folder.
desc_create_preset: Creates a new JSON preset using the typed preset name and current draft values.
desc_save_preset: Overwrites the selected saved preset with the current draft.
desc_load_preset: Loads the selected preset into the draft. Use Apply to save it to config.
desc_duplicate_preset: Duplicates the selected preset using the typed preset name.
desc_rename_preset: Renames the selected preset file using the typed preset name.
desc_delete_preset: Deletes only the selected preset JSON file. It does not touch saves.
desc_reset_preset_file: Rewrites the selected preset JSON with default values.
desc_export_preset: Exports the current draft to the exports folder as readable JSON.
desc_import_preset: Imports the newest .json from the imports folder and adds it to saved presets.
desc_reload_presets: Reloads the saved preset list from disk.
desc_reset_category: Restores only the current category to default values.
desc_boss_profiles_enabled: Experimental. Matches enabled boss profiles by object or component name and applies health, incoming damage, and Hornet damage multipliers.
desc_boss_profiles_fallback_global: Experimental. Keeps global boss multipliers active when no enabled profile matches the detected boss.
desc_boss_profiles_file: Creates a readable boss-profiles.json file. Speed and healing fields are saved for future safer hooks.
desc_context_boss_rules: Reserved. Prepared for boss-only rules such as healing, damage, and ability costs.
desc_context_exploration_rules: Reserved. Prepared for exploration-only rules such as drops and movement.
desc_context_low_health_rule: Reserved. Prepared for low-health bonuses or danger rules.
desc_context_death_streak_tracking: Reserved. Prepared for repeated-death tracking without permanent save changes.
desc_adaptive_enabled: Reserved and off by default. Future adaptive difficulty will be reversible and stored only in mod data.
desc_adaptive_max_assist: Reserved cap for future adaptive adjustments.
desc_adaptive_apply_mode: Reserved mode for future adaptive suggestions or automatic changes.
